rules.name: Displacement texture file must exist
rules.message: Displacement texture file is missing or cannot be resolved.
rules.why: Missing displacement maps can change object silhouettes, create render holes, or make farm renders diverge from approved lookdev. Displacement dependencies must be resolved before publish or farm submission.

rules.name: Displacement amount must stay within the risk budget
rules.message: Displacement amount is above the configured production risk budget.
rules.why: Excessive displacement can explode render time, memory, tessellation, and silhouette changes. Keeping amount within a profile-defined budget reduces farm risk.
